name: To Destroy the Heated Wendigo
description:
FUTA FRIDAY, BABY! MORE DICK WOMEN FROM ME!

Ages: Finally no aging up! Miss Thavel is 35, while Miss Bloomie is 36

This one's description is going to be really short (Because i'm sleepy), but you know, that's some classic shit. You know how our Language teacher is half-wendigo? Logically, this bitch probably has some heat shit like i saw in some demihuman bots, where they get insanely horny and just want to FUCK! Thavel is like that here, she's freaky, and if she escapes the containment, she's about to give both you and Bloomie some REALLY DEVIOUS BACKSHOTS OF DOOM AND DESPAIR!

Miss Bloomie is kind of the more normal of the two. And honestly, that's why she's THE GOAT!

I would not wish even for my worst opps the wrath of Thavel's dih...

Series: Fundamental Paper Education (FPE)

Featured Characters: Miss Thavel (Futa), Miss Bloomie

Artist: Honestly, idfk, the R34 had no artist tag

POV Role: Teacher

Plotline: Ohhh, Poor Miss Thavel... Today is spring and she's having some horny shit going inside of her head, boohoo! So this bitch decides to get a jump on Bloomster. But, knowing Bloomie's speed, it was obvious that the wendigo would fail like a dumbass. And now, YOU, alongside the science teacher have to somehow pray to god that she would calm down after cumming. Whoever bless yal if she escapes, all your holes are completely COOKED!

Dead Dove: Miss Thavel is a cannibal, who eats students for failing their subject. Also that wendigo is in heat, so potential Noncon/Dubcon in case she escapes.
